song.title: Come To The River
song.presentation: V1 V2 C1 V2 V3 C2 B C2 B C2
song.lyrics:
[v1] Let me drink from the living water Bringing life to my very core In the midst of my desperation, Jesus [v2] When I'm dry running on the empty Flow your streams of life through me You're the life giving water, Jesus [c1] Come, Come, Come to the river You are the living water Wash me clean, wash me clean [v3] In this place we have found freedom Cleansing streams have set us free You are all that we ever need, Jesus, Jesus [c2] Come, Come, Come to the river You are the living water Wash me clean, wash me clean
Come, Come, Come to the river You are the living water Flow through me, wash me clean [b] I give You all of the praise No one else will ever take Your place, ever take Your place I give You all of my days No one else will ever take Your place, ever take Your place
